title: chrysocoma monantha
intro: Chrysocoma monantha, also known as the single-stemmed chrysocoma or single-flowered chrysocoma, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Chrysocoma monantha are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against infections. Chrysocoma monantha can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
